startPoint.en: Speak to Darren Lightfinger in his cellar accessed through a trapdoor north of Lumbridge furnace. (via )
startPoint.es: Habla con Darren Lightfinger en su sótano, al que se accede por una trampilla al norte de la fundición de Lumbridge. (mediante)

recommended.name: Ardougne cloak
recommended.display: Ardougne cloak, gloves of silence, and food for players with low Thieving and Constitution levels

recommended.name: Draynor Village
recommended.display: Method for travelling to Draynor Village (e.g. Draynor lodestone or charged amulet of glory)

recommended.name: Varrock
recommended.display: Method for travelling to Varrock (e.g. Varrock lodestone or Varrock Teleport)

recommended.name: Lumbridge
recommended.display: Method for travelling to Lumbridge (e.g. Lumbridge lodestone or Lumbridge Teleport)

recommended.name: Featherfingered necklace
recommended.display: Featherfingered necklace to avoid being stunned and damaged when caught pickpocketing

rewards.display: 5,000 + 4,800 experience for turning in the flame fragments

rewards.name: Lost Her Marbles (miniquest)/Improved loot
rewards.display: Improved loot from pickpocketing NPCs up to level 40 Thieving

rewards.name: Dodgy Derek's Dirty Deals
rewards.display: Access to Dodgy Derek's Dirty Deals store run by Dodgy Derek

rewards.name: Guild expands with several more rooms and NPCs
rewards.display: Guild expands with several more rooms and NPCs

rewards.name: Thieves' Guild III
rewards.display: Thieves' Guild III - when entering the Thieves' Guild after completion

rows: Lumbridge Market, and Al Kharid, at the marketplace.
Lockpick the trapdoor in the Lumbridge forest northwest of the Lumbridge Castle.
Lumbridge, in the chicken pen area east of the river.
Draynor Village, roaming in the marketplace; Lumbridge near the vegetable stall.
Al Kharid, in the palace courtyard. Warrior women in Ardougne and Varrock Palace count.
Varrock, near south and west entrances or palace courtyard.
Rogues' Castle, use teleport obelisks in the Wilderness.
Dorgesh-Kaan, roaming in the centre of the marketplace.

text.en: Talk to Darren . Talk to Robin to collect your loot.
text.es: Habla con Darren. Habla con Robin para recoger tu botín.

chatOptions: 3. I've had some success tracking down flame fragments.

text.en: Talking to Robin the 4th time completes the Miniquest.
text.es: Al hablar con Robin por 4ª vez se completa la minimisión.
